gaps.description: Core single-function ask() API with multi-round tool loop is fully implemented
file_read / file_write via agentic-filesystem abstraction (browser virtual FS) is implemented
JavaScript code execution in browser sandbox via quickjs-emscripten is implemented
Python execution in browser via Pyodide is implemented
Anthropic and OpenAI provider adapters with custom provider fallback are implemented
Zero framework concepts (no chain/graph/memory) — minimal API surface maintained
shell_exec tool uses Node.js child_process and is not browser-compatible, conflicting with browser-first vision
No default browser filesystem provided out of the box — users must manually pass an AgenticFileSystem instance, violating zero-config promise
Pyodide is dynamically imported but not bundled — browser Python support requires external CDN load, fragile in offline/CSP-restricted environments
